summary_text: `Phase 4` is intentionally marked **deferred** in spec (`~/.claude/cache/fugue-v2-spec.md:113`) and has no explicit pass criteria beyond that label, so the runtime completion is still partial by intent. Findings (production-relevant, file+line evidence): 1. `role_weights` is defined in config but has no downstream effect today. - Config exists and is loaded from `~/.claude/docs/lane-guard.json`: [`assets/docs/lane-guard.json:68-74`](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/docs/lane-guard.json#L68) 2. The role-weight helper exists but is orphaned. - `lib/lane-guard.js` has `DEFAULT_ROLE_WEIGHTS` + `getRoleWeight`, and exports them, but nothing in the worktree imports and uses it: [`lib/lane-guard.js:85-97`](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/lane-guard.js#L85), [`lib/lane-guard.js` no call sites via `rg`](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/lane-guard.js#L100) 3. Runtime bridge path does not consume role model semantics. - `fugue-lane-bridge.mjs` only consumes `loadGuardConfig`, `validateDiversity`, `validatePhaseEvidence`, etc.; no role-weight read/use exists there: [`fugue-lane-bridge.mjs:26-33`](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L26) 4. The active weighted scoring path still hardcodes role weights, so “role model” cannot be configured by `lane-guard.json`. - `weightedScore` uses fixed numeric weights by regex match: [`phase-runner.mjs:35-41`](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/phase-runner.mjs#L35) 5. No regression test covers role-weight config influence. - Existing guard tests cover phase evidence/diversity only, not role-weighted behavior from config: [`tests/test-bridge-guard.mjs:13-50`](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-bridge-guard.mjs#L13) Minimal safe patch set to make Phase 4 meaningfully complete without speculative scope: 1. [`assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/phase-runner.mjs`](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/phase-runner.mjs) - Replace hardcoded branch in `weightedScore` (lines 35-41) with config-driven role weight lookup. - Keep fallback to 1.0 for unknown agents. 2. [`assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/guard.js`](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/guard.js) (or `lib/lane-guard.js`, but `guard.js` is already loaded by bridge) - Expose a small helper (`getRoleWeight(agent)` plus optional `getRoleWeights`) sourced from merged `loadGuardConfig().role_weights`. 3. [`assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/` (new focused test file or extend existing)] - Add one regression test asserting `lane-guard.json` role weights alter `weightedScore` outcome and unknown roles still default. - Keep to a single unit-level test path, no infra deps. Recommended files only (high confidence): - [`/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/phase-runner.mjs`](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/phase-runner.mjs) - [`/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/guard.js`](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/guard.js) - [`/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-phase4-role-weights.mjs`](/tmp/phase0-1c8023/assets/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/tests/test-phase4-role-weights.mjs)
